acceptance_state: No leakage-critical rule remains OPEN. Final states used: FROZEN / DERIVED_MECHANIC / RESOLVED_BY_OWNER / OUT_OF_SCOPE.
boundary: Synthetic-only. No real/dev/validation/OOS data opened, no vendor adapter, no residual/z/sigma/beta/sector/ADV computation, no metric, no tuning, no result-driven rule selection.
designation: MR-002 Workstream C — Signal & Data-Production Qualification (SPQ-1), Phase 0
frozen_input_identities: sector-ETF proxy mapping table (hash in evidence)

internal_consistency_corrections.Correction_1: SIG-33 cross-reference -> SIG-27 (the decision/execution seam rule).
internal_consistency_corrections.Correction_2: Missing-input taxonomy frozen into 4 non-collapsing codes (OLS_WINDOW_INSUFFICIENT=INELIGIBLE young; OLS_WINDOW_INCOMPLETE=INTEGRITY_STOP interior hole; KNOWN_MARKET_ABSENCE=INELIGIBLE governed halt; SIGNAL_INPUT_IDENTITY_MISMATCH=REFUSED SPY/sector); RETURN_INPUT_MISSING retired non-emittable.
internal_consistency_corrections.Correction_3: SIG-20 close-t decision_eligibility_status excludes the t+1 gap filter and z/percentile; gap outcome moves to ExecutionEnrichedCandidateRecord.execution_admissibility_status.

phase0_stop: Census + schemas + owner-rulings + draft matrix ONLY. No production signal modules or tests. OWNER-A/B/C RATIFIED (2026-07-20); the three internal-consistency corrections are applied. Awaiting owner final Phase-0 technical closure; SPQ-1 implementation remains NOT AUTHORIZED.
purpose: Implementation-binding census for the upstream layer that PRODUCES the candidate facts Increment 3 consumes. v1.1 incorporates the 12 owner rulings (2026-07-20); every previously-OPEN rule is now RESOLVED_BY_OWNER. No implementation; no real data; no computation.

detail.OWNER-A: SIG-32 (R6): first scoreable boundary = 125 registered return sessions (earliest return index t-124) and 126 registered price observations.
detail.OWNER-B: SIG-25 (R11): ADV = MEDIAN of raw close x raw volume over two windows (60-session selection, 20-session cap = trailing_adv_dollars) — frozen V3 controls.
detail.OWNER-C: SIG-04 (R1): missing close WITH governed halt/absence evidence -> INELIGIBLE:KNOWN_MARKET_ABSENCE; unexplained hole -> INTEGRITY_STOP:OLS_WINDOW_INCOMPLETE.

refusal_taxonomy.DEPRECATED_NON_EMITTABLE:RETURN_INPUT_MI: RETIRED (Correction 2): too generic; NEVER emit — use OLS_WINDOW_INSUFFICIENT (young), OLS_WINDOW_INCOMPLETE (interior hole, no evidence), KNOWN_MARKET_ABSENCE (governed halt), or SIGNAL_INPUT_IDENTITY_MISMATCH (SPY/sector factor)
refusal_taxonomy.INELIGIBLE:ADV_WINDOW_INSUFFICIENT: insufficient sessions for the registered ADV window
refusal_taxonomy.INELIGIBLE:ELIGIBILITY_EVIDENCE_MISSING: a required eligibility evidence identity / availability timestamp is missing
refusal_taxonomy.INELIGIBLE:KNOWN_MARKET_ABSENCE: a missing close WITH governed halt/absence evidence — ordinary ineligibility (Correction 2)
refusal_taxonomy.INELIGIBLE:OLS_WINDOW_INSUFFICIENT: the security does not yet have the required registered history (IPO/young) — ordinary ineligibility (Correction 2: moved from the INTEGRITY_STOP family)
refusal_taxonomy.INELIGIBLE:R5_WINDOW_INSUFFICIENT: fewer than 5 valid consecutive residuals for R5 (never bridge)
refusal_taxonomy.INELIGIBLE:SECTOR_PIT_IDENTITY_MISSING: no PIT-resolvable sector at t (never defaulted)
refusal_taxonomy.INELIGIBLE:ZSCORE_VARIANCE_INVALID: sigma_i,t-1 is zero (z undefined) — INELIGIBLE with a registered reason (Ruling 5)
refusal_taxonomy.INTEGRITY_STOP:BETA_INPUT_INVALID: beta regression inputs invalid (folds into OLS_DESIGN_SINGULAR — same regression)
refusal_taxonomy.INTEGRITY_STOP:FUTURE_INFORMATION_DETECT: any post-decision-cutoff field or identity in a SignalDecisionRecord
refusal_taxonomy.INTEGRITY_STOP:OLS_DESIGN_SINGULAR: the OLS design matrix is rank-deficient / numerically singular
refusal_taxonomy.INTEGRITY_STOP:OLS_WINDOW_INCOMPLETE: an interior historical stock-return hole WITHOUT governed halt/absence evidence — fails closed (must not be concealed as an ordinary exclusion)
refusal_taxonomy.INTEGRITY_STOP:SESSION_CALENDAR_MISMATCH: session index / numbering diverges from the registered calendar
refusal_taxonomy.INTEGRITY_STOP:SIGMA_RESID_NONFINITE: a non-finite intermediate in the mu/sigma pass (Ruling 5)
refusal_taxonomy.INTEGRITY_STOP:ZSCORE_WINDOW_INSUFFICIEN: fewer than 60 complete overlapping R5 observations for mu/sigma
refusal_taxonomy.REFUSED_CODE_OR_DATA_IDENTITY:SIGNAL_INP: frozen-input identity mismatch (SPY / sector-ETF map / sector source / calendar / adjustment)

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: Governed session index = registered snapshot session dates; session ordinals not calendar arithmetic.
rules.implementation_consequence: Bind the registered session index; mismatch -> SIGNAL_INPUT_IDENTITY_MISMATCH.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: Signals computed AFTER close t; entry t+1 official open; five-session time-stop at open of session 6.
rules.implementation_consequence: Decision cutoff = close of session t; no post-close-t observation in the decision record (SIG-27).
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: Signal returns = total-return-adjusted; execution = split-only open/close; gap = distribution-adjusted; dollar-volume = raw close x raw volume.
rules.implementation_consequence: Total-return series for the residual model; raw close x raw volume for ADV; mismatch -> SIGNAL_INPUT_IDENTITY_MISMATCH.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.economic_meaning: IPO / insufficient history / interior missing sessions
rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: 60 VALID registered sessions t-60..t-1; no interior observation skipped/compressed/forward-filled/replaced; the producer must not build 'the last 60 available' across gaps.
rules.implementation_consequence: IPO/insufficient registered history -> INELIGIBLE:OLS_WINDOW_INSUFFICIENT; missing close WITH governed halt/absence evidence -> INELIGIBLE:KNOWN_MARKET_ABSENCE; interior missing STOCK return WITHOUT governed evidence -> INTEGRITY_STOP:OLS_WINDOW_INCOMPLETE; missing SPY/sector factor -> REFUSED_CODE_OR_DATA_IDENTITY:SIGNAL_INPUT_IDENTITY_MISMATCH. These four cannot collapse into one another (Correction 2).
rules.note: OWNER-C RATIFIED 2026-07-20: a registered session missing the stock close is INELIGIBLE:KNOWN_MARKET_ABSENCE only with governed halt/absence evidence; an unexplained hole fails closed to INTEGRITY_STOP:OLS_WINDOW_INCOMPLETE (Ruling 9 integrity-first precedence — must not be concealed as an ordinary exclusion).
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: Rolling 60-session OLS on DAILY ARITHMETIC TOTAL returns; missing observation => ineligible/integrity; no winsorization.
rules.implementation_consequence: Daily arithmetic total returns (total-return-adjusted series).
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: No interior missing observation may be skipped, compressed, forward-filled, or replaced within the 60-session window.
rules.implementation_consequence: Interior missing stock return -> INTEGRITY_STOP:OLS_WINDOW_INCOMPLETE; never bridge the gap.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: Rolling 60-session regression ending t-1: r_Sector = a + beta_Sector*r_SPY + u_Sector; residual u_Sector is the sector factor.
rules.implementation_consequence: Produce u_Sector,t from the frozen sector-ETF series + SPY (SIG-30/31).
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: Rolling 60-session OLS on t-60..t-1: r_i = alpha + beta_m*r_SPY + beta_s*u_Sector + eps; day-t residual from t-1 coefficients; intercept included.
rules.implementation_consequence: Emit eps_i,t and beta_m,i (SIG-09); window 60 ending t-1; intercept included.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: beta_i = beta-hat_m,i, the MARKET-beta coefficient of the same §3 Step-2 60-session stock regression (§5 beta-limit binds 'beta_i = each stock's §3 beta-hat_m').
rules.implementation_consequence: beta is a by-product of the residual regression; no separate/secondary beta model.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: One deterministic registered least-squares implementation, float64, intercept, no regularization/ridge/pseudodata/factor-dropping/alternate-model; preregister solver identity + fixed numerical rank tolerance (a mechanics constant, never selected from results).
rules.implementation_consequence: Rank-deficient / numerically singular design fails closed -> INTEGRITY_STOP:OLS_DESIGN_SINGULAR. Census preregisters solver identity + rank tolerance before implementation.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: PIT sector mapping per V2; an unresolvable sector => excluded, never defaulted.
rules.implementation_consequence: No PIT-resolvable sector -> INELIGIBLE:SECTOR_PIT_IDENTITY_MISSING; never a default sector.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: R5_i,t = eps_i,t-4 + eps_i,t-3 + eps_i,t-2 + eps_i,t-1 + eps_i,t (five CONSECUTIVE registered-session residuals).
rules.implementation_consequence: Sum the 5 consecutive registered-session residuals ending at t.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: Exactly 5 residuals over 5 CONSECUTIVE registered sessions; weekends/holidays irrelevant (use registered sessions); do not bridge an interior data gap; do not use the last five available across a missing registered session.
rules.implementation_consequence: Missing residual in the five -> INELIGIBLE; never bridge.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: z = (R5_t - mu_t-1)/sigma_t-1; mu,sigma over the 60 complete overlapping R5 ending t-1 (R5_t-60..R5_t-1); ddof=1; current R5_t excluded; one pass; no winsorization/floor/clip.
rules.implementation_consequence: One deterministic normalization pass yields mu, sigma, z. Zero sigma -> INELIGIBLE (registered reason); non-finite intermediate -> INTEGRITY_STOP.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: registered_signal_value = z_i,t exactly (no clip/floor/winsor/rank).
rules.implementation_consequence: Emit registered_signal_value = z_i,t; Z_entry threshold + |z| ordering are DOWNSTREAM (Increment-3, closed).
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: registered_sigma_resid = sigma_i,t-1 = sample std (ddof=1) of the 60 overlapping R5 ending t-1 = the z-normalization denominator.
rules.implementation_consequence: Emit sigma from the SAME pass as z (SIG-17). Strictly positive + finite; no floor/imputation.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: registered_signal_value (z) and registered_sigma_resid (sigma) derive from one deterministic pass sharing the same 60-value window identity; current R5_t excluded from mu/sigma.
rules.implementation_consequence: Qualification proves z and sigma_resid share one normalization-window identity + computation record.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: PIT sector/industry history OR historically-effective SIC/NAICS via a FROZEN mapping table whose hash ships in evidence; no present-day backfill; survivorship-free.
rules.implementation_consequence: Bind the frozen sector-mapping-table hash; sector_id PIT + evidence-bound; mismatch -> SIGNAL_INPUT_IDENTITY_MISMATCH.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: effective classification at t = latest accepted PIT sector record whose availability timestamp <= close t (filing date alone insufficient if a later acceptance/publication timestamp exists); same-timestamp -> source amendment/supersession ordering, else deterministic later-accepted-filing identity; a successor does not inherit the predecessor's sector/history except via the governed lineage registry.
rules.implementation_consequence: Ambiguous same-timestamp precedence -> INTEGRITY_STOP:SECTOR_EFFECTIVE_DATE_CONFLICT; ambiguous lineage -> INTEGRITY_STOP:SECURITY_IDENTITY_AMBIGUOUS. Never select on current classification.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: Two-stage semantics (Correction 3). CLOSE-t decision eligibility = security/universe eligibility AND earnings clearance AND corporate-action clearance AND liquidity AND required signal inputs+provenance (all knowable at close t). DOWNSTREAM selection (Increment 3) = z threshold, cross-sectional percentile, portfolio construction. OPEN-t+1 entry admissibility = official open exists AND gap filter passes AND execution constraints pass. The gap filter is NOT a close-t eligibility fact.
rules.implementation_consequence: Emit decision_eligibility_status in {ELIGIBLE, INELIGIBLE} at close t (no z-threshold, no percentile, no gap filter); Increment 3 never recomputes. Gap outcome lives in ExecutionEnrichedCandidateRecord.execution_admissibility_status (ADMISSIBLE|CANCELLED_GAP|CANCELLED_MISSING_OPEN|...).
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: No open when a PIT-known earnings announcement falls between the t+1 open and max exit (open session 6); revised-timestamp availability only; BMO/AMC conservative if indistinguishable.
rules.implementation_consequence: INELIGIBLE on earnings-window overlap; requires PIT earnings-calendar availability timestamps.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: Entry cancelled at t+1 open if |AdjOpen_t+1/AdjClose_t - 1| >= 6% (distribution-adjusted).
rules.implementation_consequence: EXECUTION-time (t+1) test -> enrichment step, NOT the decision record (SIG-27).
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: Every eligibility rule uses source data available by close t. Precedence: (1) integrity/identity, (2) missing mandatory signal input, (3) security/universe ineligibility, (4) event blackout, (5) liquidity/price, (6) signal threshold. Each outcome carries rule ID, observed value, threshold/interval, source identity, availability timestamp, decision cutoff. No fact published after close t affects the session-t record.
rules.implementation_consequence: Integrity -> stop (taxonomy); ordinary exclusion -> INELIGIBLE:ELIGIBILITY_EVIDENCE_MISSING when evidence absent; below-threshold -> not selected downstream (not a failure).
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: Min signal history = exactly the derived warm-up (SIG-32), no reduced-history fallback. Eligible = US-listed operating-company common equity + registered common share classes in the frozen universe. Exclude (unless governed): ETF/ETN/CEF/preferred/rights/warrants/units/SPAC-units/OTC/foreign-ordinary/duplicate-listings. Exchange from the frozen PIT universe. Halt known by close t or no valid close-t observation -> INELIGIBLE; valid decision but missing t+1 open -> Increment-2/3 execution-layer cancel/defer; SPQ-1 never invents a next-open.
rules.implementation_consequence: INELIGIBLE for excluded security types; INELIGIBLE:OLS_WINDOW_INSUFFICIENT for insufficient history; INELIGIBLE:KNOWN_MARKET_ABSENCE for a governed halt/no-close; execution-layer handles a missing t+1 open (CANCELLED_MISSING_OPEN).
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.conflicting_source: Ruling 11 recommended mean of adjusted_close x raw_volume over 20 sessions; frozen V3 (§4 lines 31-32/84) specifies raw close x raw volume and §4 (lines 30-33/253) specifies MEDIAN. Per Ruling 11's own override clause, V3 governs.
rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: Frozen §4: 'Dollar volume = raw (unadjusted) close x raw volume' (lines 31-32, 84) and the statistic is the MEDIAN dollar volume, over TWO windows: trailing 60-session median (universe top-250/150 + >$25M liquidity screen, lines 30-33) and trailing 20-session median (the 2% execution cap, line 253). trailing_adv_dollars (candidate fact) = the 20-session median. PIT mechanics (Ruling 11): window ends t-1, current session excluded, exactly-N present.
rules.implementation_consequence: Bind MEDIAN of (raw close x raw volume); 20-session median = trailing_adv_dollars, 60-session median = universe/liquidity screen. Missing any required session -> INELIGIBLE:ADV_WINDOW_INSUFFICIENT; no mean/median-swap/winsor/zero-fill/short-window fallback.
rules.note: OWNER-B RATIFIED 2026-07-20: V3 controls -> MEDIAN of raw close x raw volume, two windows (60-session selection, 20-session cap = trailing_adv_dollars). Ruling 11's mean/adjusted recommendation is superseded by frozen V3 per the ruling's explicit override clause.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: Entries without a valid official open cancelled; exits without one pend until the next official open. Official open = split-only, non-dividend-adjusted, t+1 regular-session open.
rules.implementation_consequence: Session-(t+1) fact; a missing future open is registered ONLY at the execution session, never at decision.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: SignalDecisionRecord (close t) must NOT contain official_next_open_price, actual_execution_session, or any post-close-t field; the t+1 enrichment step appends the official open + execution timestamp WITHOUT recomputing decision facts.
rules.implementation_consequence: Two structurally distinct records; enriched record = adapter into the CLOSED Increment-3 replay contract. Post-cutoff field/identity in a decision record -> INTEGRITY_STOP:FUTURE_INFORMATION_DETECTED.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: permanent_security_id from the frozen PIT identity registry. Ticker change with registry economic continuity -> same permanent id, history continues. New permanent security (merger/spinoff/reincorporation/new share class) -> history does NOT continue unless the governed lineage registry authorizes it. Lineage record binds predecessor/successor permanent id, effective session, corporate-action type, history-continuity authorization, source evidence identity.
rules.implementation_consequence: Ambiguous lineage -> INTEGRITY_STOP:SECURITY_IDENTITY_AMBIGUOUS. Sector looked up for the active permanent security at the cutoff.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: candidate_id = unique decision-record identity binding program ID / configuration ID / decision session / permanent security ID / side / signal-record identity; symbol = time-varying display/execution identifier; candidate_id must not replace the permanent security identifier.
rules.implementation_consequence: Emit all three distinctly; Increment-3 tie-breaks bind permanent_security_id.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: The market factor is the SPY total-return series (Step-1 + Step-2 regressor r_SPY).
rules.implementation_consequence: SPY total-return series = REQUIRED frozen input; mismatch -> SIGNAL_INPUT_IDENTITY_MISMATCH.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: Sector factors = sector-ETF residuals u_Sector; sector-ETF proxy mapping + source series = the FROZEN mapping table whose hash ships in evidence.
rules.implementation_consequence: Sector-ETF proxy mapping + source series = REQUIRED frozen inputs; mismatch -> SIGNAL_INPUT_IDENTITY_MISMATCH.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

rules.governing_quote_or_paraphrase: Derived mechanically from the nested frozen windows (Ruling 6). eps_s needs coefficient returns [s-60,s-1] PLUS the day-s return -> earliest return for eps_s is s-60. Earliest normalization value R5_(t-60) has earliest residual eps_(t-64), whose earliest return is (t-64)-60 = t-124. Latest needed return = t (for R5_t). => return sessions [t-124, t] = 125 registered RETURN sessions (124 prior + current); a return needs one preceding close => 126 registered PRICE observations [t-125, t].
rules.implementation_consequence: First scoreable decision session t requires exactly 125 registered return sessions (earliest return index t-124) and 126 registered price observations; one session too early -> INELIGIBLE. Min-history (SIG-24) inherits this exact number; no reduced-history fallback.
rules.note: OWNER-A RATIFIED 2026-07-20: first scoreable boundary = 125 registered return sessions (earliest return index t-124) and 126 registered price observations [t-125, t], correcting the summary tally 124/125. Min-history (SIG-24) inherits this exact number.
rules.supersession_authority: A new owner-signed decision superseding v0.3-frozen-into-v1.0 (70108c11).

status_legend.DERIVED_MECHANIC: a required deterministic consequence of frozen rules / owner clarification
status_legend.FROZEN: explicit in the governing chain; the producer binds it
status_legend.RESOLVED_BY_OWNER: was OPEN; resolved by a 2026-07-20 owner ruling (see resolved_by_owner_ruling)
